purpose: Own demo-only UI state projection helpers for labels, readouts, and focus panel text.
invariants: Feature helpers take explicit inputs instead of importing demo main state.
Graph render-loop behavior remains in demo/src/main.ts.
DOM IDs stay centralized in features/control-plane/dom.ts.
Visible labels and separators should remain behavior-compatible unless intentionally changed.
change_protocols: When adding a focus panel field, update projection and DOM application together.
When changing toggle labels, keep mode readout formatting in mode-readout.ts.
